capabilities.description: PDF, MP4, MP3, CSV, and plain-text attachment links remain downloadable.
Table of contents, page tree, and children macros render dynamic navigation.
Attachments, content-by-label, recent updates, history, and contributors macros scan page collections dynamically.
Excerpt, page-properties, and page-properties-report macros support reusable and aggregated content.
Live search, task report, labels list, and popular labels macros explore many pages.
Profile picture, user profile, and external widget macros retain their dynamic parameters.
Title, global labels, and page content state can change while parent and space remain stable.
A user mention and inline status remain distinct from page-level metadata.
Read-only representations, restrictions, parent, space, and optimistic locks remain verifiable after upload.
An AI-assisted local edit preserves complex structure, dynamic macros, links, API representations, exact no-op convergence, and rendered browser behavior.
A direct PI filesystem edit through OpenRouter preserves locally authored macros, decisions, nested structure, tasks, tables, layouts, links, exact no-op convergence, and rendered behavior.
Native-editor H1-H6 hierarchy, inline marks, alignment, quotation, preformatted text, hard break, and divider survive storage round-trip and render correctly.
Nested ordered and unordered lists, assigned/due and completed tasks, merged table cells, mentions, dates, emoji, and inline status remain functional.
One-, two-, three-, sidebar-, four-, and five-column native layouts retain all eight sections and twenty-two columns with measured browser geometry.
The integrated asynchronous remote-render preflight completes before mutation, then the accepted info panel, four-column layout, link, and table survive API and browser verification.

image_alternative_texts: Accessible Confluence storage round-trip architecture diagram

capabilities.description: An image authored with the ac:alt storage attribute retains the same alternative text in regenerated ADF, rendered HTML, and the authenticated browser accessibility tree.
Current Page Tree Search, Blog Posts, Content Report Table, Include Content, User List, and Decision Report forms survive local storage editing and execute in the authenticated tenant.
Create from Template launches a configured meeting-notes draft and the current iFrame form loads and plays its exact embed.
A UI-created Roadmap Planner remains opaque and functional while a locally authored Table of Contents Zone body generates top and bottom navigation links.

Two editor-created synced-block nodes retain their resource identities while a locally revised source body and table render in the authenticated page; REST view placeholders are not treated as dynamic truth.
